title: Configuring MQL for Unicode
breadcrumbs: Support for Unicode in the MQL Connector
text: Configuring MQL for Unicode To configure MQL to support Unicode, edit the application assignment file. Set the unicode connector option to on : USYS$MQL_PARAMS unicode = on Copy Set the $WIDE_CHAR_BEHAVIOR assignment setting to BMP . The MQL connector does not support the full Unicode range, so this setting ensures that the connector does not try to store Unicode characters outside the BMP. For a Unicode database, also set the $DEF_CHARSET setting to UTF8 . CAUTION: This setting can only be used for a Unicode database. If the database character set is not utf8 , do not set $DEF_CHARSET=utf8 ; otherwise runtime errors can occur if Unicode characters are used. Related Links Support for Unicode in the MQL Connector The Uniface MQL connector can support Unicode. By default, Unicode support is disabled. unicode Enable or disable Unicode support in the MQL connector. $WIDE_CHAR_BEHAVIOR Specify the character set used for String fields with the W packing code. $DEF_CHARSET Specify the default character set used for storing data in String fields with C packing code.
